title: Study of RMC-6236 in Patients With Advanced Solid Tumors Harboring Specific Mutations in RAS

eligibility.text: Histologically confirmed advanced solid tumor with specific KRAS G12 mutations (dose escalation) or RAS mutations (dose optimization/expansion) identified through deoxyribonucleic acid (DNA) sequencing. PDAC with wild-type RAS (expansion).
eligibility.justification: This criterion ensures the study population is representative of a specific group for which treatment efficacy is being assessed.

eligibility.text: Treatment naive or have received prior standard therapy appropriate for tumor type and stage
eligibility.justification: This criterion ensures the study population is comparable to historical controls, maximizing the likelihood of detecting a treatment effect.

eligibility.text: Have Eastern Cooperative Oncology Group (ECOG) performance status of 0 or 1
eligibility.justification: This criterion ensures participants can tolerate the study's demands, promoting data quality and compliance.
This criterion protects patients from potential harm by ensuring they have sufficient physiological capacity to handle treatment.
This criterion ensures the study population is representative of a specific group for which treatment efficacy is being assessed.
This criterion protects patients from potential harm by ensuring they are not already experiencing neurological complications that could be exacerbated by the study treatment.

eligibility.text: Known or suspected impairment of gastrointestinal function that may prohibit ability to swallow or absorb an oral medication
eligibility.justification: This criterion ensures participants can tolerate the study's demands, promoting data quality and compliance.

eligibility.text: History of any other unstable or clinically significant concurrent medical condition that would, in the opinion of the investigator, jeopardize the safety of a participant, impact their expected survival through the end of the study participation, and/or impact their ability to comply with the protocol prior/concomitant therapy
eligibility.justification: This criterion ensures participants are not at increased risk for complications or adverse events related to the study treatment.
This criterion acknowledges that additional factors might influence participant eligibility and data quality, requiring further assessment.

power_analysis.assessment: N/A — Phase 1 trial, not powered for efficacy

endpoints.text: Incidence and severity of treatment-emergent Adverse Events (AEs) and serious AEs, including incidence and severity of findings in laboratory values and vital signs
Number of Participants with Dose-Limiting Toxicity (DLT)
Maximum Observed Blood Concentration (Cmax) of RMC-6236
Time to Reach Maximum Blood Concentration (Tmax) of RMC-6236
Area Under Blood Concentration Time Curve (AUC) of RMC-6236
Ratio of accumulation of RMC-6236 from a single dose to steady state with repeated dosing

adaptive_designs.description: Adaptive design detected: Types identified: Dose-Finding / Phase I.

safety_adverse_events.ae_ascertainment: Not explicitly described (assumed standard investigator reporting)
safety_adverse_events.safety_monitoring: Investigator-reported with sponsor oversight (no DSMB mentioned)
